name: WateROAM ROAMfilter Plus
description: ROAMfilter Plus is a simple, portable ultrafilter system designed for rural and disaster-stricken communities without electricity.

taxonomy.sub_category: WateROAM ROAMfilter Plus Updated on January 16, 2024 · Created on September 27, 2018 WateROAM ROAMfilter Plus ROAMfilter Plus is a simple, portable ultrafilter system designed for rural and disaster-stricken communities without electricity. Developed By wateroam Tested By WateROAM ROAMfilter Plus Content Partners Unknown Info Tags Snapshot Manufacturing & Delivery Performance & Use Research & Standards Feedback Product Description Roamfilter Plus is a water filtration system designed for the development of rural and disaster-struck areas. It is a lightweight, simple and durable system which can produce more than 250 litres of clean water per hour. An introduction video about WateROAM filter Plus is also available. Target SDGs SDG 6: Clean Water and Sanitation SDG 7: Affordable and Clean Energy Market Suggested Retail Price $250.00 Target Users (Target Impact Group) Community Distributors / Implementing Organizations Partners include NUS, Singapore Red Cross, Relief Singapore, PUB, World Vision, Shell, Spring Singapore. Countries Burma, China, Malaysia, Nepal, Singapore Manufacturing/Building Method Manufactured by WaterROAM. Intellectural Property Type Patent User Provision Model Users can obtain the product from the manufacturers directly. Distributions to Date Status Unknown Description of the combined methods Ultrafiltration Manufacturer-specified water treatment rate (L/hr) 200 L/hr Bacteria reduction 6 log Virus reduction 4 log Protozoa reduction Unknown Heavy metals and/or arsenic reduction Unknown Maximum recommended influent turbidity level (NTU) Unknown Effluent turbidity levels (NTU) Unknown Safe water storage capacity (L) None Manufacturer-specified lifetime volume (L) N/A Consumables Filter cartridge Design Specifications The product can operate as handpump, solar pump, pedal pump, gravity fed or tap pressure and doesn't require electricity. The product schematics are as follows: Filter: ultrafilteration up to 0.02 microns Weight: 2.7 kg (System, dry weight); 3.2 kg (with packaging) Dimensions: 10 x 16 x 73 cm (system); 20 x 20 x 75 cm(with packaging) Pressure: 1.5 bar max Operational pH: 3-10 Flow rate: 200L/hr (handpump) Technical Support Contact the manufacturers or visit their Singapore office Replacement Components Filter cartridge in 1-2 yrs; available by the manufacturer. Lifecycle Depending on the input water quality and the frequency of maintenance, the filter can last for to 2 years. Replaceable filter cartridge can extend the lifespan. Manufacturer Specified Performance Parameters This includes product being simple, lightweight, safe and durable. Vetted Performance Status Tested by manufacturer Safety Sea water can not be filtered by the product Complementary Technical Systems Safe water storage units, products reducing chemical contents. Academic Research and References This product is discussed in the following paper: Pooi, C.K., Ng, H.Y., Review of low-cost point-of-use water treatment technologies for developing communities , Clean Water, 2018, 1:11. “Portable water filters for emergencies and rural development,” WATEROAM.
